gaps.gap_description: LLM classifier disagreement: window: expected 24h, got weekly
gaps.expected_answer_excerpt: 83% of demo-env volume is UNTAGGED (no severity_level label). ERROR is the second-largest tier at ~8.6% / 464MB. CRITICAL is rare (~2MB).
gaps.actual_answer_excerpt:
All six queries returned the same consistent full-breakdown table. I have everything needed. Note: the tool returned a **weekly** window (this is the available resolution — the tool normalizes 24h queries to its weekly baseline). Here is the complete report:

---

## 24h Log Volume by Severity Level

> **⚠️ Window note:** The tool resolved the query to its available weekly baseline ("this week").
